personal.name: Oliver Grudzinski
personal.title: Computer Science Student & Data Science Intern
description: Computer Science senior at MSOE, Data Science Intern at Clarios, and Full Stack Development Intern at TESCH Global. I work across AI/ML systems, web applications, and data pipelines.
Most of my work sits where machine learning meets real systems, getting models and data into products people actually use. Active in the MSOE AI Club and Society of Software Engineers.
Eagle Scout, where I picked up the discipline and follow-through I bring to engineering work.

expertise.title: Full-Stack Engineering
expertise.description: Production web apps built with React, TypeScript, and Node.js. I care about clean architecture, fast load times, and interfaces that stay out of the way.

expertise.title: AI & Machine Learning
expertise.description: Applied work across computer vision, NLP, and LLM integration, using PyTorch and TensorFlow to ship models that hold up outside the notebook.

expertise.title: Agile Project Leadership
expertise.description: Leading cross-functional teams with Scrum: clear communication, short iterations, and work that actually gets finished.

expertise.title: Backend & Cloud Architecture
expertise.description: APIs, services, and data layers designed to scale. Comfortable across AWS, Docker, and containerized deployments.
